prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-GOLDPANKIT-2PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 2pc Gold Prospector’s Bundle with Carbon Steel Digger Trowel and Sand Scoop Description: Hit the riverbed or creek with confidence using this 2pc Gold Prospector Bundle, designed for beginners and seasoned gold hunters alike. This compact, powerful set combines precision digging with efficient sand sifting to make every prospecting adventure more productive.

The 13" Gold Rush Prospector’s Digger Trowel is built for performance: heat-treated carbon steel with a double serrated edge cuts through soil, gravel, and roots with ease. The ergonomic grip with a 5" handle ensures comfortable use for hours, and the included nylon sheath keeps your trowel protected and portable.

Paired with the 8.5" Large Plastic Sand Scoop, this set lets you quickly collect and sift through river sand or paydirt. Featuring 78 holes per scoop for rapid drainage, a 3-quart capacity, and ultra-lightweight single-piece construction, it’s easy to handle even in tight spaces. Its durable plastic design and bright green color make it both practical and easy to spot outdoors.

pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-Pc Gold Prospector Bundle Digger Trowel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Carbon Steel Digger With Sand Scoop, 13 Inch Trowel, Beginner Gold Panning Kit, Heat-Treated Double Serrated Edge

openai.title_differentiation: Heat-Treated Carbon Steel Digger, Double Serrated Edge, 78-Hole Sand Scoop, 3-Quart Capacity, Nylon Sheath
